_comment: Beacon control-plane layout in Infisical. Each top-level key below is a secret PATH; each entry under it is stored as one secret whose key is the entry name and whose value is the JSON object shown (as a compact string).

/beacon/providers/email._comment: One JSON object per SMTP provider. The secret key is the provider name (e.g. 'sendgrid-transactional'). Set is_default: true on exactly one provider.

/beacon/tenants._comment: One JSON object per tenant (a team/product owning services). The secret key is the tenant id.

/beacon/services._comment: One JSON object per registered calling service. The secret key is the service id. 'keys[].sha256' is the SHA-256 hex digest of the full API key (bk_<id>_<secret>) handed to the calling service; only the hash is ever stored.
